metadata.title: Textile Manufacturing | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered textile manufacturing platform for all your production operations — from CRM and production management to inventory tracking, purchasing, and subcontracting.

hero.title: Textile Manufacturing
hero.description: Manage customer relationships, create accurate quotes, and handle every step of production from product design to shipping.
hero.testimonialQuote: It's very good and detailed. Each module has so many things, you are never out of control. From raw material to finished goods, everything is traceable.

cards.crm: The CRM qualifies leads, allowing immediate creation of project samples and quotations.
cards.quoteRequest: Allow customers to easily request a quote using predefined templates on your website.

cards.deliveryOrders: Delivery orders are automatically created in inventory when sales operations are confirmed.
cards.traceability: Lots and package tracking allows full traceability of your inventory.

productionSection.title: Smooth production
productionSection.subtitle: workflow
productionSection.description: Create predefined or custom bills of material, procure components automatically, and track production with shop floor operations.

purchaseSection.title: Track your
purchaseSection.description: Handle purchasing, dropshipping, and subcontracting to keep your inventory perfectly stocked.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Smart tools for textile production, inventory, quotations, traceability, purchasing and invoicing.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Track leads, samples, and quotations through every sales stage.

list.title: Clear traceability
list.description: Follow materials from raw goods to finished products with lot tracking.

list.title: Subcontracting Management
list.description: Coordinate with external partners for dyeing, printing, and finishing.

list.title: Automate workflow
list.description: Auto-create manufacturing orders when sales are confirmed.

list.title: Project top bar
list.description: Visualize project progress, deadlines, and key metrics at a glance.

list.title: Flexible invoicing
list.description: Invoice based on milestones, quantities, or custom terms.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your textile manufacturing operation, CRM, production, and inventory.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.content: It's very good and detailed. Each module has so many things, you are never out of control. From raw material to finished goods, everything is traceable.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Malik
testimonials.content: AdonERP transformed our textile manufacturing workflow. The integration between CRM, production, and inventory is seamless. Our lead times have improved dramatically.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for textile manufacturers and apparel producers.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a textile manufacturing workflow that helps you manage production, track materials, and deliver quality products on time.
